verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve ever wondered, how much I love You Every day I stand in Your presence Giving all to You I never want to be far away from You When I go astray, I find Your love Reaching out to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus I’m in love with You Jesus I’m in love with You Take me deeper Deeper in love with You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus I want more of You Jesus I want more of You Draw me closer Closer to Your heart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: How much do I love You So much that My heart can’t live without How much do I want You So much that D I’ll give my life for You
